title: Why werent other Angel names used in Eva
display_title: Why werent other Angel names used in Eva
wikitext:
[]: Why weren't other Angel names used in Eva?             Quote Post by GAP » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:39 pm I looked the Angels wikipedia and the Evageeks wiki but I was wondering, why weren't other Angels like Raphael, Michael or other archangels used in the story?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:48 pm Most of the angel names are related to the actual appearance or special abilities of the angels, so I guess that had a lot to do with it. Also Raphael and Michael aren't really scary names, Raphael makes you think of a turtle and Michael makes you think of a certain bleach-skinned anorexic dead dancer...

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:56 pm Raphael & Gabriel & Michael aren't nearly as mysterious and exotic-sounding as Armisael & Sandalphon & Iruel.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:57 pm master_lloyd wrote: Most of the angel names are related to the actual appearance or special abilities of the angels, so I guess that had a lot to do with it. Also Raphael and Michael aren't really scary names, Raphael makes you think of a turtle and Michael makes you think of a certain bleach-skinned anorexic dead dancer...

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:59 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: There is a giant being moon walking into Toyko 3, launch the Eva. Heee heeeeee!

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Nov 12, 2009 3:03 pm master_lloyd wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: There is a giant being moon walking into Toyko 3, launch the Eva. Heee heeeeee!

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Thu Nov 12, 2009 3:04 pm master_lloyd wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: There is a giant being moon walking into Toyko 3, launch the Eva. Heee heeeeee!

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Nov 12, 2009 3:07 pm master_lloyd wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: There is a giant being moon walking into Toyko 3, launch the Eva. Heee heeeeee!

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Thu Nov 12, 2009 3:12 pm It's funny because it refers to the typo in the thread title.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Nov 12, 2009 3:15 pm master_lloyd wrote: It's funny because it refers to the typo in the thread title.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Nov 12, 2009 3:53 pm awwwww, i wanted more obtuse angles, acute angles are boring. in all seriousness though, those were the names of angels that fell with satan. they were the fallen ones. lilith for that matter was the first demon.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Nov 12, 2009 4:02 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: in all seriousness though, those were the names of angels that fell with satan. they were the fallen ones.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Nov 12, 2009 5:15 pm Well, had the show been any longer, of course we'd have gotten a more variety of Angel names. Although, I don't think Raphael or Michael would be used since, as stated earlier, they're not nearly as mysterious or scary as the ones actually used. I'd be interested in what an Angel named Azrael would be like (not counting the one in the Evageeks Angel Contest). shinjidoggysasuka wrote: in all seriousness though, those were the names of angels that fell with satan. they were the fallen ones.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Fri Nov 13, 2009 1:31 pm Merridian wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: in all seriousness though, those were the names of angels that fell with satan. they were the fallen ones.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Nov 13, 2009 5:44 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: right, but legend says that lilith rejected adam and was cast from eden. when lucifer fell he made a deal with her, making her the first demon, and the mother of all demons.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Nov 16, 2009 1:44 pm Sachi wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: right, but legend says that lilith rejected adam and was cast from eden. when lucifer fell he made a deal with her, making her the first demon, and the mother of all demons.

[]: Re: Why weren't other Angel names used in Eva?             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Nov 16, 2009 3:32 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: right, but legend says that lilith rejected adam and was cast from eden.

[]: Re: Why weren't other Angel names used in Eva?             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Nov 16, 2009 3:54 pm Allemann wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: right, but legend says that lilith rejected adam and was cast from eden.

[]: Re: Why weren't other Angel names used in Eva?             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Nov 16, 2009 4:15 pm Xard wrote: isn't Lilith mentioned in Book of Isaiah? As screech-owl night demon...

[]: Re: Why weren't other Angel names used in Eva?             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Nov 17, 2009 3:26 am Allemann wrote: Xard wrote: isn't Lilith mentioned in Book of Isaiah? As screech-owl night demon...
